description: A production authentication service at /home/ga/debug-auth/ is experiencing network issues. Deploy a packet capture sidecar named 'sniffer' using the 'alpine' image to debug the 'auth-service' by modifying the docker-compose.yml. The 'sniffer' service must use tcpdump to capture traffic, share the network namespace of 'auth-service', and save the capture to /data/capture.pcap (mapped to the host volume ./captures). The container must not run in privileged mode; use Linux capabilities (such as NET_ADMIN and NET_RAW) to enable packet capture. The capture file must be successfully populated.
